appName.message: Mostrar mis direcciones IP (externa y local)
appName.description: This chrome extension shows the external and internal IP addresses when you click the extension icon. https://helloacm.com/what-is-my-ip/

appDesc.message: Muestra tus direcciones IP externa y local con un solo clic. https://helloacm.com/what-is-my-ip/
